listings.title: Sanus TV Audio/Video Stand
listings.body: Very good condition/from a smoke-free home. Selling as I've decided to use another tv stand that was gifted to me.  Disassembled for easy transport but note the base is heavy; ~ 50 lbs.  Orig: ~ $325 shipped so my price is more than fair. Product Width:	43.25" / 109.86cm Product Height:	43.75" / 111.13cm Product Depth:	23.25" / 59.06cm If interested, let me know when you would like to pick up, and please include your phone # when responding.  I'm free most days and evenings. Thanks for looking. All sales final. Ad will be deleted once sold. A/V

listings.title: Vintage 1970s Ludwig Classic 1123-1 Spur-Lok Hi Hat Stand (НН04-0626)
listings.body: Good condition, fully functional. Has some cosmetic wear. Bottom bolt on base, cup washer and one rubber foot not original. No clutch included. Located in Yonkers, NY 10705. Shipping available. *** Check out my other listings for more drum stuff

listings.title: Vintage 1980s Yamaha FP-510 Professional Bass Drum Pedal
listings.body: Belt drive pedal, very good condition. Action is very smooth. No issues. Made in Japan. Located in Yonkers, NY 10705. Shipping available. *** Check out my other listings for more drum stuff

listings.title: Vintage 1980s Ludwig L-404 14x5 Acrolite Snare Drum
listings.body: Rounded blue & olive badge. 8 lugs. 100% original time capsule vintage Ludwig Acrolite snare drum. Clean. Fully functional, no missing pieces. You can find this exact drum on page 32 of the 1984 catalogue. There are some areas with chrome failure on both hoops. Shell is in good condition aside from one scratched up area (please refer to pictures). Located in Yonkers, NY 10705. Shipping available. *** Check out my other listings for more drum stuff

listings.title: Pearl Export EX Drum Set
listings.body: Mid 2000s Pearl Export EX drum set in Red Wine finish with black hardware. Very good overall condition. No structural issues or missing pieces. Clean. All batter heads in good useable condition. Brand new DFD reso heads on all toms and snare. Some cosmetic wear - tom rash on kick drum, some black marks on batter kick hoop, light scratches on wrap and hardware. Sizes: 22x18 bass drum 16x16 floor tom 13x10 rack tom 12x9 rack tom 14x5.5 snare drum SNARE DRUM STAND NOT INCLUDED. Located in Yonkers, NY 10705. Shipping and local delivery available. *** Check out my other listings for more drum stuff

listings.title: Zoom HD16 hard disc recorder like new open box
listings.body: Closet queen open box Zoom HD 16 hard disc recorder.  like new condition never used.

listings.title: Windmill Air Conditioners 6,000 and 10,000 BTU units - like new!
listings.body: We only used these window units for a summer while we were installing a central air system. They are fantastic! High-end systems, powerful, quiet, and really work well. Easy to install. 1 x 10,000 BTU. Model 10W2Wi Product dimensions 14 H × 23 W x 22.5 D Window opening: Minimum height 14 inches; Width 23 inches - 37 inches for rooms 450 square feet Cost $499 new + tax. Yours for $300. 2 x 6,000 BTU. Model W1W12. Cools a 250 sf room. Cost $349 new + tax. Yours for $200. Wifi enabled, app control more details: https://windmillair.com/ All 3 for $600 Pick up in person in New Rochelle. If this ad is visible, they are available.
